title: Physics-Breaking Images
oneLiner: See the Matrix — AKA Make the Loci Loco. Build images that defy gravity, scale, or time.
locus: No Limits L2 — Gym Lobby Chalkboard
status: Fresh — Day-0 ★★★☆☆ partial, rebuild armed for E13 Day-1
whyItWorks: Default-scale static images fade. Physics-breaking images survive because the brain pays extra attention to anomalies — gravity violations, dimensional impossibilities, scale mismatches. The encoded image was recursive: a 2D chalkboard producing 3D binary code that fell with a ton's weight despite being microscopic, then climbed up my legs and packed into my muscles. The named emotion was DOWNLOADED with code, Neo-style. Cold-tested thirty seconds later — built ★★★★★, recalled at ★★★☆☆ when the dimension-break specificity drifted. Real signal: build quality is not the same as Day-0 retrieval quality. The error half is data.
